MILITARY_GENERAL.NO_MISSION_AVAILABLE: No missions available at the moment.
MILITARY_GENERAL.CALL_BACK_SOLDIERS_CONFIRMATION:
Are you sure you want to call back the Company? 

Abandoning a Mission provides no reward.
MILITARY_GENERAL.ABANDON_CAMPAIGN_CONFIRMATION:
Are you sure you want to call back the Battalion? 

Abandoning a Campaign provides only the Current Spoils of War.
MILITARY_GENERAL.BATTALION_LEFT: Your battalion left for a military campaign. For the King!
MILITARY_GENERAL.NO_CAMPAIGN_AVAILABLE:
No campaign is available at the moment.

Prove yourself on the battlefield; your King will eventually invite you to fight by his side!
MILITARY_GENERAL.CHANGE_COMPANY_WEAPON: Assign the quality of the company's weapons. If no more weapons of this quality are available, combatants will equip lower-quality ones.
MILITARY_GENERAL.COMPANY_STATUS_WARNING_TITLE: Company is ready but has issue(s)
MILITARY_GENERAL.COMPANY_BEHAVIOR_PATROL_DESCRIPTION: Companies on Patrol Duty spend their work time patrolling the village. They cannot be assigned to missions.
MILITARY_GENERAL.COMPANY_BEHAVIOR_MISSION_DESCRIPTION: Companies on Mission Duty will spend their work time preparing for missions. They can be selected for missions but will not patrol the village.
MILITARY_GENERAL.COMPANY_X_ON_THIS_MISSION_DAYS: {1} should be back in a few days.
MILITARY_GENERAL.COMPANY_X_ON_THIS_MISSION_WEEKS: {1} should be back in a few weeks.
MILITARY_GENERAL.COMPANY_X_ON_THIS_MISSION_MONTHS: {1} should be back in a few months.
MILITARY_GENERAL.BATTALION_BACK_IN_DAYS: We expect to hear from the Battalion in the next few days.
MILITARY_GENERAL.BATTALION_BACK_IN_WEEKS: We expect to hear from the Battalion in a few weeks.
MILITARY_GENERAL.BATTALION_BACK_IN_MONTHS: We expect to hear from the Battalion in a few months.
MILITARY_GENERAL.DISBAND_X_CONFIRMATION: Are you sure you want to ungroup this {1}?
MILITARY_GENERAL.COMPANY_HAS_FAVORED_WEAPON: A Company is more effective when wielding weapons favoured by the Mission.
MILITARY_GENERAL.MIGHT_DESC:
Might is the combat capability of a Company. The higher the Might, the easier it is to succeed during difficult missions. 

Might is based on the size of a Company, along with the Strength, Happiness, and Training of its Combatants.
MILITARY_GENERAL.SOLDIER_RANK_DESC:
Each Combatant has a Rank, which increases their Strength. It is based on Experience and Promotions.

Ranks increase over time by earning Experience from missions.

Once at their highest Rank, a Combatant must be promoted to progress further.

{1}
MILITARY_GENERAL.SOLDIER_HAPPINESS_DESC: Combatant Happiness affects how likely they are to endure missions unharmed.
MILITARY_GENERAL.SOLDIER_CONDITION_WOUNDED_DESC: The Combatant is Wounded: They will earn little Experience and might not return from missions.
MILITARY_GENERAL.SOLDIER_CONDITION_TRAINING_DESC: The Combatant is still training: They will earn moderate Experience and will likely be harmed during missions.
MILITARY_GENERAL.SOLDIER_CONDITION_FULLY_TRAINED_DESC: The Combatant is Fully Trained: They will earn plenty of Experience and are unlikely to be harmed during missions.
MILITARY_GENERAL.SOLDIER_XP_PROGRESSION: This Combatant needs {1} Experience to progress to the next Rank.
MILITARY_GENERAL.MAX_LEVEL_REACHED: This Combatant has reached the highest {1} Rank.
MILITARY_GENERAL.SOLDIER_STRENGTH_DESC:
Strength is the combat capability of an individual Combatant.

Rank, Weapon Strength, and Training Conditions improve Combatant Strength.
MILITARY_GENERAL.WAR_RATION_DESC: War Rations are required for this mission.
MILITARY_GENERAL.MISSION_RISK_DESC: Weapons might break and Combatants might not return from this mission.
MILITARY_GENERAL.MILITARY_GRADE_1_DESC:
A Military Company of 1st Grade is entirely composed of Militiamen. It can only perform simple missions.

To increase the Grade of the Company, promote at least one Combatant to Soldier Status.
MILITARY_GENERAL.MILITARY_GRADE_2_DESC:
A Military Company of 2nd Grade has at least one Soldier. It can perform more rewarding missions compared to 1st Grade.

To increase the Grade of the Company, promote at least one Combatant to Knight Status.
MILITARY_GENERAL.MILITARY_GRADE_3_DESC: A Military Company of 3rd Grade has at least one Knight. It can perform the most rewarding missions.
MILITARY_GENERAL.COMPANY_PLUR_STATUS_WARNING_TITLE: Companies are ready but have issue(s)
MILITARY_GENERAL.MILITARY_MISSION_GRADE_1_DESC: These missions yield simple rewards and pose little to no challenge. Companies of all grades can perform 1st-grade missions.
MILITARY_GENERAL.MILITARY_MISSION_GRADE_2_DESC: Companies of 2nd and 3rd Grade can undertake these moderately challenging missions, which yield two different kinds of rewards in average quantities.
MILITARY_GENERAL.MILITARY_MISSION_GRADE_3_DESC: Only 3rd-grade Companies can tackle these highly challenging missions, which provide at least three kinds of rewards in abundant quantities.
MILITARY_GENERAL.UNAVAILABLE_GRADE: No Companies with the required Military Grade are available.
MILITARY_GENERAL.ALL_SUITABLE_COMPANIES_AWAY: All suitable Companies are on missions.
MILITARY_GENERAL.MILITARY_REWARD_DESC: You will receive a {1} reward of {2}.
MILITARY_GENERAL.SOLDIERS_BETWEEN_CYCLE_FOR_FEW_DAYS: Combatants are recuperating for a few days
MILITARY_GENERAL.SOLDIERS_BETWEEN_CYCLE_FOR_FEW_WEEKS: Combatants are recuperating for a few weeks
MILITARY_GENERAL.SOLDIERS_BETWEEN_CYCLE_FOR_FEW_MONTHS: Combatants are recuperating for a few months
MILITARY_GENERAL.NOTIFICATION_COMPANY_BACK_FROM_CYCLE: {1} is back from a mission with
MILITARY_GENERAL.FINISH_MISSION_X_TO_UNLOCK: Finish {1} first to unlock this mission.
MILITARY_GENERAL.NO_COMPANY_SLOT_AVAILABLE_FOR_WEAPON: No available Company Slot for this Company's weapon type
MILITARY_GENERAL.COMPANY_BEHAVIOR_GUARD_DESCRIPTION: Companies on Guard Duty will spend their work time guarding fortification buildings. They cannot be assigned to missions.
MILITARY_GENERAL.SINGLE_MISSION_DESC: These missions are completed in a single step. Once completed, the assigned Companies return home with the reward.
MILITARY_GENERAL.CYCLING_MISSION_DESC: These missions consist of multiple steps of equal difficulty. After each step, the assigned Companies return home with a portion of the accumulated reward to rest and train for a few days. They then embark on the next step. Upon completing the third step, the mission concludes, and the assigned Companies return home with the remaining rewards. A bonus reward is granted based on the Companies' performance.
MILITARY_GENERAL.MILITARY_CAMPAIGN_DESC: These missions involve steps with increasing difficulty and rewards. Assigned Companies do not return home after each step, though you have the option to abandon the Military Campaign, allowing the Companies to return with some of the rewards accumulated thus far. Upon completing the third step, the Campaign concludes, and the surviving Companies finally return home.
MILITARY_GENERAL.MISSION_INFO_NEW_COMPANY: Build a new Encampment to create a new Company.
MILITARY_GENERAL.OUTCOME_NEW_MISSION: Katonai küldés hozzáadása a hadügyi könyvhöz.
MILITARY_GENERAL.OUTCOME_CAMPAIGN_CALLBACK: Hívd vissza a zaszlóaljadat a jelenlegi hadirátüklel.

SOLDIER_STATUS.COMPANY_STATUS_AVAILABLE: Company is ready and has no issues
SOLDIER_STATUS.COMPANY_STATUS_ON_MISSION: Company is out on a mission

EVENTS.KINGDOMWAR_INTRO_MISSION_01_DESC:
The King has acknowledged your unwavering loyalty and deems you worthy to join him in battle!

To help you succeed, he has instructed the First Constable to assist you in assembling a mighty force capable of enduring a lengthy military campaign. Once ready, the King will judge the power of your combatants.

Now is the time to rise and prove the true strength of your warriors!
EVENTS.KINGDOMWAR_INTRO_MISSION_01_CHOICE_A_TIT: You can count on our companies, your Majesty!
EVENTS.KINGDOMWAR_INTRO_MISSION_01_CHOICE_A_TOO: The King will expect you to train a mighty army and stock War Rations.
EVENTS.KINGDOMWAR_INTRO_MISSION_02_DESC:
The First Constable has acknowledged your hard work and believes your forces are ready to march into battle. 

She bestows you the honour of having your mightiest Company accompany the royal army on their next deployment.
EVENTS.KINGDOMWAR_INTRO_MISSION_02_CHOICE_A_TOO: The First Constable will expect you to support her army with your mightiest Company.
EVENTS.KINGDOMWAR_INTRO_MISSION_CAMPAIGN_SUCCES: Your Company has proven itself capable of fighting in the name of the King.
EVENTS.KINGDOMWAR_INTRO_MISSION_CAMPAIGN_FAILUR: Your Company was defeated; the First Constable will offer you another chance later.
EVENTS.KINGDOMWAR_INTRO_MISSION_QUEST_SUCCESS_D: You trained a powerful Company and stocked enough War Rations to send them to war.
EVENTS.KINGDOMWAR_INTRO_MISSION_QUEST_DESC: I have agreed to stock War Rations and train a mighty Company for the First Constable.
EVENTS.KINGDOMWAR_INTRO_MISSION_02_QUEST_DESC: I have agreed to lend my mightiest Company to the First Constable.
EVENTS.KINGDOMWAR_INTRO_MISSION_SUPPORT_DESC: The First Constable wants our mightiest Company to accompany her to war. If we serve her well, we will have the right to fight by the side of our King!
EVENTS.KINGDOMWAR_INTRO_DESC:
Your King bestows you the privilege of joining him in battle!

Answer his call and assemble a mighty battalion from your companies, for he needs all the strength his realm can offer.
EVENTS.KINGDOMWAR_INTRO_RECURRING_DESC:
Your King calls for help!

Answer his plea and assemble a mighty battalion from your companies, for he needs all the strength his realm can offer.
EVENTS.KINGDOMWAR_INTRO_CHOICE_A_TOOLTIP: You will begin preparations for a military campaign.
EVENTS.KINGDOMWAR_INTRO_CHOICE_NO_TOOLTIP: The King will ask you again next year.
EVENTS.KINGDOMWAR_INTRO_MISSION_CHOICE_NO_TOOLT: The First Constable will ask you again next year.
EVENTS.KINGDOMWAR_01_A_DESC: Your Liege plans to attack a fortified line along the Enemy's border. Should he succeed with your help, he promises to reward you with steel, coins, and stones from the Enemy's dreadful fortresses.
EVENTS.KINGDOMWAR_01_B_DESC: The Enemy has raided the King's farmlands; if you aid in repelling the attackers, your Liege promises steel, coins, and a portion of the bread they plundered.
EVENTS.KINGDOMWAR_01_C_DESC: The Enemy is at the realm's doorstep! The King offers steel, coins, and kegs of his finest beer to those willing to join the fight.
EVENTS.KINGDOMWAR_02_A_DESC:
Your battalion won battles, but the war endures!

The Enemy disrupted trade routes, and your King promised aid for their goods. Supporting him brings greater rewards, including common clothes.
EVENTS.KINGDOMWAR_02_B_DESC:
Your battalion won battles, but the war endures!

Your King knows he's against wealthy nobles; if you capture them, he promises you a large coffer of their jewels.
EVENTS.KINGDOMWAR_02_C_DESC:
Your battalion won battles, but the war endures!

Your King aims to strike behind enemy lines; he promises a considerable share of their tools if you disrupt their supplies.
EVENTS.KINGDOMWAR_02_CHOICE_C_TITLE: They won't know what hit them!
EVENTS.KINGDOMWAR_02_CHOICE_TOOLTIP: Your battalion will progress to a second mission.
EVENTS.KINGDOMWAR_03_A_DESC:
Your King declares that victory is near, and it's all thanks to your battalion!

Your Liege will lead the upcoming battles, and fighting alongside him will earn you royal gifts, including his prized blades.
EVENTS.KINGDOMWAR_03_B_DESC:
Your King declares that victory is near, and it's all thanks to your battalion!

And yet, the Enemy rallies their remaining forces to try and break your advance! Your King offers finely crafted spears in return for one final strike.
EVENTS.KINGDOMWAR_03_C_DESC:
Your King declares that victory is near, and it's all thanks to your battalion!

Your King plans a final ambush to defeat the Enemy; he offers valuable rewards and his rival's finest bows in return for your help.
EVENTS.KINGDOMWAR_03_CHOICE_C_TITLE: They are in for a surprise!
EVENTS.KINGDOMWAR_03_CHOICE_TOOLTIP: Your battalion will progress to a final mission.
EVENTS.KINGDOMWAR_03_CHOICE_NO_TITLE: This is too much; I cannot.
EVENTS.KINGDOMWAR_CHOICE_NO_TOOLTIP: Your battalion will abandon its current campaign.
EVENTS.EVENT_KINGDOMWAR_OPPORTUNITY_DESC: Your King demands you prepare for war!
EVENTS.KINGDOMBOARD_T1_A_DESC: The First Constable offers a bounty of coins to anyone who can send a company to patrol strategic roads crossing your lands.
EVENTS.KINGDOMBOARD_T2_A_DESC: A nearby community of farmers is plagued by dangerous beasts. They're offering some of their goods to anyone who can drive the creatures away.
EVENTS.KINGDOMBOARD_T2_B_DESC: Several settlements are offering a portion of their harvest to anyone who can dispatch soldiers to secure their lands.
EVENTS.KINGDOMBOARD_T2_C_DESC: The First Constable has a shortage of guards for outposts near your village. She promises fair compensation to any fighters willing to lend a hand for a time.
EVENTS.KINGDOMBOARD_T3_A_DESC: Convoys of merchants are venturing through a notoriously perilous part of the realm. They will share some goods with anyone who can ensure their safety.
EVENTS.KINGDOMBOARD_T3_B_DESC: Royal Army scouts have spotted well-armed enemy companies near our lands. Anyone who defeats them can claim the enemy's weapons for themselves.
EVENTS.KINGDOMBOARD_T3_C_DESC: Border settlements have been seized by enemy forces. Their Elders offer a share of their granaries to anyone who can liberate them.
EVENTS.KINGDOMBOARD_T4_A_DESC: The First Constable plans to build a line of forts along the realm's borders. She offers coins and leftover materials to combatants willing to hold the line.
EVENTS.KINGDOMBOARD_T4_B_DESC: The Royal Army is advancing deep into enemy territory, opening up new opportunities for raids on villages rumoured to be brimming with goods.
EVENTS.KINGDOMBOARD_T4_C_DESC: The First Constable has her eyes on a series of enemy forts famed for withstanding long sieges. Whoever captures them can keep the provisions inside.
EVENTS.KINGDOMBOARD_T4_D_DESC: A noble has been taken hostage by a bitter rival and promises a fortune to whoever can set him free. The thing is - no one knows where he has been taken to.

COMPANY_WARNINGS.COMPANY_WARNING_MISSING_WEAPON: At least one combatant has no weapon equipped
COMPANY_WARNINGS.SOLDIER_WARNING_WOUNDED: Combatant is wounded and needs to rest
COMPANY_WARNINGS.COMPANY_WARNING_WOUNDED: At least one combatant is wounded
COMPANY_WARNINGS.SOLDIER_WARNING_UNTRAINED: Combatant is untrained and needs practice
COMPANY_WARNINGS.COMPANY_WARNING_UNTRAINED: At least one combatant is untrained
COMPANY_WARNINGS.SOLDIER_WARNING_UNTRAINED_PATROL: Combatant is not fully trained for patrol
COMPANY_WARNINGS.COMPANY_WARNING_UNTRAINED_PATROL: At least one combatant is not fully trained for patrol
COMPANY_WARNINGS.COMPANY_WARNING_LOW_HAPPINESS: At least one combatant has less than {1}% Happiness
